title: Ohuhu Oil Paints for Artists, 24 Colours x 12ml Tubes Oil Paint Set - Rich Pigment & Non-Toxic, Creamy Texture on Paper Canvas Wood Ceramic Fabric, Ideal for Wall Art, Landscape & Portrait Painting
features: 24 BRIGHT COLOURS OIL PAINT SET: this oil paint set offers a good selection of colours, including titanium white, lemon yellow, medium yellow, ochre yellow, flesh colour, orange, rose, vermilion, scarlet red, carmine red, prussian blue, cobalt blue, ultramarine blue, cerulean blue, emerald green, juice green, viridian, purple, burnt siena, burnt umber, RoRoher UmberRoher ne's grey and ivory black.

GREAT OIL PAINTING SET FOR BEGINNERS: Ohuhu oil paint set offer the beginning artist a great selection of colour; This oil colour paints glide smoothly onto canvases bursting with creativity. Each tube is filled with 12 ml (0.4 oz) of high quality rich pigments colouring paints.

NON-TOXIC & RICH PIGMENT OIL PAINT SET: Safety is key, which is why we’re glad to say these oil paints are safe and non-toxic, and can be used by adults, novices and paint masters alike. Ohuhu’s oil based paint dries quickly for a durable paint finish. Each tube is filled with 12 mL (0.4 oz) of high quality richly pigmented colouring paints. Paint away with peace of mind.

PREMIUM OIL PAINT SET: The oil paints are highly pigmented, with wide coverage and strong colouring power perfect for painting landscapes, abstracts, scenic paintings and fine portraits. This large paint set is a must-have for novice and professional painters alike.

PORTABLE OIL PAINTING TUBES: Pay homage to the sights and sounds around you by painting it on paper. This travel watercolour set lets you do just that wherever you go from the countryside, beach, garden, park, city, and indoors.

This oil paint set features a gorgeous variety of vibrant colours, from sunny Lemon Yellow, striking Cobalt Blue, to luscious Crimson Red, giving you all the shades and colours to freely express your creativity. Creativity has no limits, and it definitely shouldn't be bounded to the home. So bring these paints outdoors! Easily paint out cityscapes and gardens with its compact and portable size. From the budding artist to the professional painter, the Ohuhu Professional Oil Paint Supply Set is the perfect complimentary set to a mind that's bursting with colour and creativity.
